sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ التَّنَقُّلَ بِالْقِطَارِ لِأَنَّهُ سَرِيعٌ وَمُرِيحٌ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi radije putuju vozom jer je brz i udoban.
sentences.translationEn: Many people prefer traveling by train because it is fast and comfortable.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَحَطَّةِ الْقِطَارِ لِأَشْتَرِيَ تَذْكِرَةً إِلَى الْعَاصِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam na željezničku stanicu da kupim kartu do glavnog grada.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the train station to buy a ticket to the capital.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ الْمُوَظَّفَ عَنْ مَوْعِدِ انْطِلَاقِ الرِّحْلَةِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao sam službenika o vremenu polaska sljedećeg putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: I asked the employee about the departure time of the next trip.

sentences.arabic: يَتَوَقَّفُ الْقِطَارُ فِي مَحَطَّاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ خِلَالَ الطَّرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Voz staje na mnogim stanicama usput.
sentences.translationEn: The train stops at many stations along the way.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ مُشَاهَدَةَ الْمَنَاظِرِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ مِنَ النَّافِذَةِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Volim posmatrati prirodne pejzaže kroz veliki prozor.
sentences.translationEn: I love watching the landscapes from the large window.
